race.description: Ladbrokes Princess Of Kilcoy Mdn Plate
race.comment: ENCHAANTED (2) went forward and gave a great sight before finishing third last time out over 1100m at Gatton. Drawn to enjoy a nice run just off the speed. In a suitable race and can go on to take this out. HURKLE DURKLE (3) managed to fill a minor placing at Gold Coast Poly two starts back before finishing seventh over 1350m at Ipswich last start. Gets some weight off with the claim and is likely to be about the money. COSMOPOLITAN LADY (10) resuming after eight months break and was in the money at the only start before another spell. Sure to be improved by a trial and can sneak into the finish again. SORT OF IN LOVE (8) next in line despite the sticky draw.
